comment.body: Historically, when the I-R spread is wide and skew is elevated, it resolves in one of two ways: either vol sellers are right and the premium decays (bullish grind), or the hedging demand is justified and realized vol catches up to implied (the crash everyone is hedging for actually happens).
comment.raw_body: Historically, when the I-R spread is wide and skew is elevated, it resolves in one of two ways: either vol sellers are right and the premium decays (bullish grind), or the hedging demand is justified and realized vol catches up to implied (the crash everyone is hedging for actually happens).
